gusworld.devops-sre/notes.summary: Presets do GusEngine (pos repivot C++/SDL3, ADR-008). Mantidos pelo devops-sre.
gusworld.devops-sre/notes.deps: SDL3 + RmlUi + Catch2 entram via FetchContent (pin de tag no CMakeLists.txt); NAO ha mais Qt/aqtinstall. Cacheados em build/<preset>/_deps.
gusworld.devops-sre/notes.sdlBuildDeps: Compilar SDL3 do fonte exige libs -dev de X11/Wayland/GL (ver .forgejo/workflows/ci.yml). Local: dnf/apt instala libXcursor-devel/libXi-devel/libXtst-devel/etc.
gusworld.devops-sre/notes.generator: Gerador padrao: Ninja. Quem nao tem Ninja usa o preset linux-release-make (fallback Makefiles).
gusworld.devops-sre/notes.gitignore: binaryDir fica em GusEngine/build/<preset> (inclui _deps); ja no .gitignore.
gusworld.devops-sre/notes.windowsMingw: WIN-CROSS-VALIDATE (2026-07-14): preset windows-mingw cross-compila Linux->Windows x86_64 via cmake/toolchains/mingw-w64.cmake. Requer pacotes g++-mingw-w64-x86-64-posix (Ubuntu) + FreeType cross-compilado from-source (Ubuntu NAO empacota freetype-mingw; RmlUi usa find_package(Freetype), nao FetchContent) instalado num prefixo apontado por WINDEPS_PREFIX ANTES do configure. Uso de HOJE = validacao pontual via GusEngine/tools/winbuild_container.sh, com -B explicito em /tmp do container (efemero); o binaryDir padrao deste preset (build/windows-mingw) e para uso FUTURO da CI (job windows-cross, rascunho comentado em .forgejo/workflows/ci.yml). Sem testPreset: o .exe cross-compilado nao roda no host Linux sem Wine (fora de escopo desta onda).

configurePresets.name: linux-base
configurePresets.description: Base Linux: C++20, compile_commands. Nao usar direto.

configurePresets.name: linux-base-make
configurePresets.description: Base Linux com Unix Makefiles (fallback quando Ninja ausente).

configurePresets.name: linux-debug
configurePresets.description: Build de desenvolvimento: simbolos, asserts, sem otimizacao.

configurePresets.name: linux-release
configurePresets.description: Build otimizado para CI e distribuicao.

configurePresets.name: linux-release-make
configurePresets.description: Identico a linux-release, mas com Unix Makefiles para hosts sem Ninja.

configurePresets.name: windows-release
configurePresets.description: ESBOCO, ADIADO ate haver runner Windows. Com SDL3 via FetchContent o setup e simples (toolchain MSVC + cmake; sem aqtinstall). Marcado hidden ate validacao no Windows.

configurePresets.name: windows-mingw
configurePresets.description: Cross-compile Linux -> Windows x86_64 via MinGW-w64 (WIN-CROSS-VALIDATE). Roda EM cima de um host Linux (condition hostSystemName=Linux, nao Windows - e a maquina que INVOCA o cross-compiler, nao o alvo). Exige toolchain mingw-w64-x86-64-posix + FreeType cross from-source (WINDEPS_PREFIX). Ver GusEngine/tools/winbuild_container.sh para o ambiente reprodutivel (container efemero, nada instalado no host).
